user.description: Select your country and type your city or postal code to search for nearby Lidl stores.

data.country: Country Code (e.g., DE, AT, ES, FR, NL, PL)

select_store.description: Select your Lidl store from the search results below.

discovery_confirm.title: Lidl store found nearby
discovery_confirm.description:
A Lidl store was discovered near your Home Assistant location:

**{name}**
{address}, {city}

Would you like to add it?

abort.already_configured: This Lidl store is already configured.
abort.no_stores_found: No Lidl stores found matching your query.

error.search_failed: Failed to query the Lidl store API.
error.no_stores_found: No Lidl stores found matching your query. Please try another search.

connection_error.title: Error communicating with Lidl API
connection_error.description: The integration is unable to fetch offers. Please check the logs.
